texto: His mom was high when Whitey was born. She was also high when she named him. Esmerelda was the name of her sister, the only person in the world who ever treated her decently, and Torno was short for tornado, because that’s how it felt when Whitey came out.Whitey’s mom had a penchant for the cocaine.
explicacao: Citação de Joey Truman sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “His mom was high when Whitey was born. She was also high when she named him. Esmerelda was the na…” articula reflexao, drug-abuse, drug-addiction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como drug-addiction e drugs.
